{{CargoRelic
|name=Purple Alien's Head
|class_id=20416
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This head belongs to a supervillain. It used to be a normal potato before it obtained the power to kill the superheroes. It never thought it would be killed by a Snail after dominating the universe for so many years. Even its huge head has become a collection.
|fame=29
|art=14
|fth=17
|civ=16
|tech=14
|ss1=Per Fugitive defeated, Snail ATK +2<br>Fugitives Defeated: 20/20
|ss2=Per Fugitive defeated, Snail ATK +4<br>Fugitives Defeated: 20/20
|ss3=Per Fugitive defeated, Snail ATK +6<br>Fugitives Defeated: 20/20
|ss4=Per Fugitive defeated, Snail ATK +6<br>Fugitives Defeated: 20/20
|ss7=Per Fugitive defeated, Snail ATK +6<br>Fugitives Defeated: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
